_schema_note: net_worth values marked method='mobile_app_verified' are read from MISA's mobile app 'Tài chính hiện tại' screen (Tổng có − Tổng nợ) — currently the MOST complete source. method='dashboard_verified' is the website's /wallets/totaldashboard API, which is MISSING ~400M in savings (a Tikcop book named 'tikcop 5 week' that stopped accruing interest 2026-05-07 and vanished from both /wallets/savings and /wallets/accumulations on the website, but is apparently still counted by the mobile app) — do not use website-verified totals without adding back this gap. method='reconstructed' values are manually summed from account/transaction APIs and may be off by 100-500M due to the same kind of undiscovered gaps — do NOT treat reconstructed deltas as precise.

snapshots.note: UNVERIFIED — manual reconstruction, not cross-checked against app's 'Tổng số dư'. Treat as approximate.

VERIFIED against mobile app 'Tài chính hiện tại' screen (screenshot 2026-06-23 10:19). Every line item cross-checked against website API data and matched exactly EXCEPT savings_account (mobile: 1,038,087,569 vs website /wallets/savings: 638,175,310, gap 399,912,259 — see _schema_note). Website's /wallets/totaldashboard (7,345,661,716) and manual reconstruction (7,420,567,195) both inherit this same ~400-515M gap and should NOT be used until the missing Tikcop book is found.
